properties.description: This is the pipeline used for fetching AAD users, groups, and group members. Group members requires you to pass in the group id to fetch members of each group. This would take a very long time using ADF since it would process each group sequentially, therefore we use a databricks notebook for group members since it can loop through each group, add them to a file, and process the table only a single time.

activities.name: set utc timestamp
activities.description: set the UTC timestamp which will be later used as part of the downloaded filenames

activities.name: copy data
activities.description: copy entity from api to sink json file

activities.name: write to delta table
activities.description: runs notebook to convert parquet to delta  table

activities.name: row count validation and notification
activities.description: notify users if row counts don't match

emailMessage.value: Row count validation failed Data Source Name: @{item().dataSourceName} Object Schema: @{item().objectSchema} Object Name: @{item().objectName} Is Incremental Load?: @{item().isIncremental} Rows Read from Source: @{activity('copy data').output?.rowsRead} Rows Inserted: @{activity('write to delta table').output.runOutput.numOutputRows}

value.value: Start of inner activity for pipeline: @{pipeline().Pipeline}

executionLogMessage.value: Started copying objects and converting to delta tables

activities.name: error notification 4
activities.description: log error and notify users if notifications are enabled

emailMessage.value:
Notebook: /data_engineering/100_raw_to_bronze/raw_to_bronze
ObjectSchema: @{coalesce(item().ObjectSchema, '')}
ObjectName: @{item().ObjectName}
Error Code: @{activity('write to delta table').error.errorCode}
Message: @{activity('write to delta table').error.message}

executionLogSubject.value: End of inner activity for pipeline: @{pipeline().Pipeline}

activities.name: error notification 3
activities.description: log error and notify users if notifications are enabled

executionLogSubject.value: End of inner activity for pipeline: @{pipeline().Pipeline}

executionLogMessage.value:
FAILURE: Error Code: @{activity('copy data').error.errorCode} 
Error Message: @{activity('copy data').error.message}

activities.name: update metadata
activities.description: update the lastExecution timestamp and recordCount in the metadata

value.value: End of inner activity for pipeline: @{pipeline().Pipeline}

executionLogMessage.value: Ended copying objects and converting to delta tables

activities.name: lookup objects
activities.description: lookup tables that are enabled in metadata table

sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT
      *
FROM adf.dataSource
WHERE 
   upper(dataSourceType) = 'REST API'
   AND (nullif('@{pipeline().parameters.dataSourceName}','-') is null OR dataSourceName IN (SELECT TRIM(VALUE) FROM STRING_SPLIT('@{pipeline().parameters.dataSourceName}', ',')))
   AND (nullif('@{pipeline().parameters.objectSchema}','-') is null OR objectSchema IN (SELECT TRIM(VALUE) FROM STRING_SPLIT('@{pipeline().parameters.objectSchema}', ',')))
   AND (nullif('@{pipeline().parameters.objectName}','-') is null OR objectName IN (SELECT TRIM(VALUE) FROM STRING_SPLIT('@{pipeline().parameters.objectName}', ',')))
   AND (nullif('@{pipeline().parameters.batchGroup}','-') is null OR batchGroup IN (SELECT TRIM(VALUE) FROM STRING_SPLIT('@{pipeline().parameters.batchGroup}', ',')))
AND isEnabled = 1
   AND IsIncremental = 0
   ORDER BY objectName ASC

activities.name: set local timestamp
activities.description: set the UTC timestamp which will be later used as part of the downloaded filenames

activities.name: get key vault uri
activities.description: lookup to the adf.azureResources table in our metadata database and get the key vault uri

sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT 
TOP 1 *

FROM adf.AzureResources

WHERE  
ResourceType = 'Key Vault'

body.value:
@concat('client_id='
,activity('get service principal client id').output.value,
'&scope=https%3A%2F%2Fgraph.microsoft.com%2F.default',
'&grant_type=client_credentials',
'&client_secret='
,activity('get service principal secret').output.value)

executionLogMessage.value: STARTING: Starting execution of the pipeline
This is the end of the pipeline

activities.name: error notification 2
activities.description: log error and notify users if notifications are enabled

emailMessage.value: There was an error during the ForEach activity of the pipeline @{pipeline().Pipeline}

executionLogMessage.value: There was an error during the ForEach activity of the pipeline @{pipeline().Pipeline}
